reasoning: The Lean signature matches the informal statement. The hypothesis `[Fintype G] [Group G]` together with `card G = 105` (using `Fintype.card` via `open Fintype`) exactly encodes |G| = 105. The conclusion `(∃ P : Sylow 5 G, P.Normal) ∧ (∃ P : Sylow 7 G, P.Normal)` captures "G has a normal Sylow 5-subgroup and a normal Sylow 7-subgroup": `Sylow p G` is Mathlib's type of Sylow p-subgroups, and `P.Normal` asserts the underlying subgroup is normal. Since all Sylow p-subgroups are conjugate, the existential form is the standard and correct rendering of the informal claim. No hypotheses are added or dropped, and the conclusion is neither weakened nor strengthened.
